mapper.select: /* VacationMapper.getVacationCompanyList: 휴가 사용 가능 회사 목록 조회 */ SELECT WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_NM , WORK_PLATFORM_NM , VACATION_LIMIT_CNT , DISP_ORD FROM WORK_COMPANY_INFO WHERE VACATION_LIMIT_CNT >= 1 ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, WORK_COMPANY_SEQ ASC

/* VacationMapper.getVacationPersonList: 휴가자 목록 조회 */ SELECT PERSON_SEQ , PERSON_NM , FAVORITE_YN , DISP_ORD FROM PERSON WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY CASE WHEN FAVORITE_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC , DISP_ORD ASC , PERSON_NM ASC , PERSON_SEQ ASC
mapper.sql: CASE WHEN V.VACATION_CD = 'VACATION_01' THEN DATEDIFF(V.END_DT, V.START_DT) + 1 WHEN V.VACATION_CD IN ('VACATION_02', 'VACATION_03') THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END
mapper.select:
/* VacationMapper.getVacationYearList: 선택 조건에 해당하는 휴가년도 목록 조회 */ SELECT DISTINCT YEAR(V.START_DT) AS VACATION_YEAR FROM VACATION V JOIN PERSON P ON P.PERSON_SEQ = V.PERSON_SEQ AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' JOIN WORK_COMPANY_INFO C ON C.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = V.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ AND C.VACATION_LIMIT_CNT >= 1 WHERE V.DEL_YN = 'N' AND V.START_DT IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY VACATION_YEAR DESC

/* VacationMapper.getVacationSummaryList: 휴가가 등록된 휴가자별 회사별 연차 사용 요약 목록 조회 */ SELECT P.PERSON_SEQ , P.PERSON_NM , C.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , C.WORK_COMPANY_NM , C.VACATION_LIMIT_CNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS USED_VACATION_CNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN V.VACATION_CD = 'VACATION_01' THEN DATEDIFF(V.END_DT, V.START_DT) + 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS FULL_VACATION_CNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN V.VACATION_CD = 'VACATION_02' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS MORNING_HALF_CNT , CAST(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN V.VACATION_CD = 'VACATION_03' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS AFTERNOON_HALF_CNT , CAST(C.VACATION_LIMIT_CNT - COALESCE(SUM(), 0) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS REMAINING_VACATION_CNT FROM VACATION V JOIN PERSON P ON P.PERSON_SEQ = V.PERSON_SEQ AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' JOIN WORK_COMPANY_INFO C ON C.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = V.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ AND C.VACATION_LIMIT_CNT >= 1 WHERE V.DEL_YN = 'N'
GROUP BY P.PERSON_SEQ , P.PERSON_NM , P.FAVORITE_YN , P.DISP_ORD , C.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , C.WORK_COMPANY_NM , C.VACATION_LIMIT_CNT , C.DISP_ORD ORDER BY CASE WHEN P.FAVORITE_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC , P.DISP_ORD ASC , P.PERSON_NM ASC , P.PERSON_SEQ ASC , C.DISP_ORD ASC , C.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ ASC

/* VacationMapper.getVacationList: 휴가 사용 상세 목록 조회 */ SELECT V.VACATION_SEQ , P.PERSON_SEQ , P.PERSON_NM , C.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , C.WORK_COMPANY_NM , V.VACATION_CD , VC.CD_NM AS VACATION_NM , DATE_FORMAT(V.START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(V.END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS END_DT , CAST( AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS USE_DAY_CNT , V.VACATION_MEMO , DATE_FORMAT(V.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(V.UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM VACATION V JOIN PERSON P ON P.PERSON_SEQ = V.PERSON_SEQ AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' JOIN WORK_COMPANY_INFO C ON C.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = V.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ AND C.VACATION_LIMIT_CNT >= 1 JOIN COMMON_CODE VC ON VC.GRP_CD = 'VACATION' AND VC.CD = V.VACATION_CD AND VC.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE V.DEL_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY V.START_DT DESC , V.VACATION_SEQ DESC
